challenge.title: Korak 2
challenge.description:
Kreiraj div element koji ima id sa greeting-card i class sa card.

Unutar div elementa, dodaj h1 sa tekstom Happy Birthday!. Zatim dodaj paragraf element sa class nazvanim message i tekstom Wishing you all the happiness and joy on your special day!.

challengeFiles.name: index
challengeFiles.contents:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
  <head>
    <meta charset="utf-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>Greeting Card</title>
    <link href="styles.css" rel="stylesheet">
  </head>
  <body>
    
  </body>
</html>

tests.text: Trebalo bi da imate element h1 unutar elementa div.
Element p treba da sadrži tekst Wishing you all the happiness and joy on your special day!.
tests.testString: assert.strictEqual(document.querySelector("div > p.message").textContent.trim(), "Wishing you all the happiness and joy on your special day!");

challengeFiles.name: index
challengeFiles.contents:
Happy Birthday!

Wishing you all the happiness and joy on your special day!

Send Card Share on Social Media

Sending your card...

Card successfully sent to your recipient!

Sharing your card...
